name: Silent Rain
short_description: Silent Rain is a challenging and immersive co-op horror game, for 1 to 4 players. Explore abandoned locations, solve puzzles, and gather information while trying to survive the threats lurking in the dark. How many tries will it take you to master your fear?
detailed_description:
IN THE RAIN, NO ONE WILL HEAR YOU SCREAM


You are a Seeker working for “the Society”, an organization facing otherworldly phenomena that need to remain secret. Recently, a strange contamination was brought to our world by a phenomenon called the Silent Rain.

In this challenging and immersive experience, explore abandoned locations, solve puzzles, and gather information while trying to survive the threat lurking in the dark.

Team up with friends or brave the terror alone to uncover the truth about the Silent Rain.

DOUBLE TROUBLE



Explore two distinct maps, each with unique settings, mechanics, puzzles, and monsters. From the cramped, secluded House where the slightest noise brings danger, to the labyrinthine abandoned Metro where even the walls seem to watch you.

EASY TO SCREAM, HARD TO MASTER



Silent Rain is designed to be a challenging experience. Every failed attempt provides more insight for future runs. Items, traps, and key elements are randomized, making every game unique. Master the mechanics and conquer the leaderboard to show off your skills!

KEY FEATURES


  • Up to 4 players online.
  • 2 maps each with a unique monster, puzzles and 3 different endings.
  • Randomly placed objects, traps, and objectives on each run.
  • In-game proximity voice chat.
  • Twitch integration.
  • Leaderboards.
  • And a lot of secrets…

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Simplified Chinese, Japanese, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
